title: phlox × cultorum
intro: Phlox × cultorum, also known as garden phlox, is a hybrid plant belonging to the phlox genus and native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Phlox × cultorum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Phlox × cultorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
